name: Leg Press
resistance_profile: Loads the quads through a deep, stable range without spinal loading.
rom_notes: Lower under control to a deep knee bend without the lower back rounding off the pad.
cues: Feet mid-platform, knees track over toes
execution_steps: Sit in the machine with your back flat against the pad and feet mid-platform, shoulder-width.
Press the sled up and release the safety catches.
Lower the platform under control to a deep knee bend without your lower back rounding off the pad.
Press through your whole foot back up, stopping just short of a hard lockout.
Re-engage the safeties after your last rep.
good_when: You want heavy quad overload without loading your spine or balancing a bar.
You want to train close to failure safely on a fixed path.
bad_when: You want the whole-body stability and core demand of a free-weight squat.
common_errors: Lower back lifting off the pad at depth
